name: article-illustration-prompt
description: Generate publication-ready image prompts for article illustrations using the LayerAxis visual style.

interface.shortDescription: Write strong prompts for article illustrations.
interface.longDescription: Article Illustration Prompt turns article concepts into structured image prompts using the Digital Rationalism and Human-Centered Minimalism style system.
defaultPrompt: Create an illustration prompt for this article.
Turn this concept into a LayerAxis prompt.
